findings.message: Calling this work 'types only' is materially inaccurate. The proposed useMutationState() hook and planned migrations change runtime hook behavior.
useAllTransactionsMutations misclassified as having manual set/clear loading state. It tracks error and success only; no loading state.
useCityTaxMutation left as TBD; it already has straightforward Pattern A surface { saveCityTax, loading, error }. Consumer count listed as 4 but is 2.
Test harness note is stale. Tests use renderHook from @testing-library/react, not @testing-library/react-hooks.
First-wave scope includes useGuestDetailsMutation (0 production consumers) while omitting useCityTaxMutation (production-used).
File count inaccurate. 51 top-level files, one hook is .tsx not .ts (useGuestsByBookingMutation.tsx).
